message:
fix(exec): correct failWithManual action message and remove debug output

Code review fixes for SmartRunner:

1. Fixed incorrect Action message in failWithManual():
   - Previously suggested "caam activate <current-profile>" which was wrong
     because currentProfile is still the rate-limited profile
   - Now suggests "caam ls" to see available profiles, then activate
   - This gives users correct guidance when auto-handoff fails

2. Removed DEBUG output statements from monitorOutput():
   - Removed "DEBUG: PTY output: %q" fmt.Printf statement
   - Removed "DEBUG: Rate limit detected in: %q" fmt.Fprintf statement
   - Per AGENTS.md: "No random fmt.Println scattered in code"

3. Additional improvements made by linter:
   - Added detector.Reset() calls after successful handoff and rollback
     to prevent immediate re-triggering
   - Refactored monitorOutput to use ObservingWriter for proper line
     buffering and rate limit detection
   - Changed cooldown duration from 30 to 60 minutes for better spacing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
